arts.ttl: Man Utd See £60M-Rated PSG Target as Attacking Boost Who Is Also Offered to Arsenal, Tottenham
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in signing Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, but no deal was reached. However, recent reports indicate the Ligue 1 club remains eager to secure the Nigerian’s services. According to Matteo Moretto and Fabrizio Romano via Viva El Fútbol, PSG’s interest in Lookman is still alive, with the forward now considering […] The post Man Utd See £60M-Rated PSG Target as Attacking Boost Who Is Also Offered to Arsenal, Tottenham appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez reveals reason Luis Suarez ‘doesn’t like’ to message Liverpool star
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has spoken about his relationship with Liverpool icon and former Uruguay team-mate Luis Suarez after scoring in the Reds' 3-1 win over Southampton at the weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Tottenham Attempt to Low Ball Bournemouth With £29.4M Offer for PSG Target
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain expressed interest in Dean Huijsen as part of their plans to strengthen their defense, but the Spanish center-back ultimately signed with AFC Bournemouth. If PSG makes another move for him, they’ll face fierce competition. arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia makes Anfield atmosphere admission and 'unfair' PSG dressing room claim after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has experienced the Anfield atmosphere previously and is confident PSG can overcome Liverpool in the UEFA Champions League last-16 second leg

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Liverpool vs PSG in the Champions League round of 16 on Tuesday night, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Slot: We will need more of the ball this time against PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes that Liverpool will need to produce their best performance of the season if they are to beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League last-16 second leg at Anfield on Tuesday night. The Reds were indebted to the heroics of goalkeeper Alisson in that first-leg win last week with the Brazilian making nine saves - his personal record in a single match for Liverpool - as they survived an attacking onslaught from PSG before Harvey Elliott fired home an 87th-minute winner.
